title: My Friend, Dr. Jekyll

actors: Ugo Tognazzi, Carlo Croccolo, Raimondo Vianello
plot: Professor Fabius has found a way of transferring his personality to another person and he transfers his to the body of Giacinto Floria, a nice teacher in a women's college. Poor Giacinto becomes a sex maniac to the puzzlement of h...
